<!--
Thanks for contributing! Please skim CONTRIBUTING.md before opening a PR — while v0 stabilizes, PRs are not actively merged from external contributors. Issues and discussions are very welcome.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, in 1-3 sentences? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling
- [ ] Other:

## Linked issues

<!-- Closes #N, fixes #M, refs #K -->

## Testing performed

<!-- What did you run? `npm test` output, manual testing notes, integration scenarios exercised, etc. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (and `npm run format:check` if applicable)
- [ ] Updated relevant docs (`README`, spec, plan, runbook) if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, API tokens, or private keys committed
- [ ] If schema changed (`TenantConfig`, `LogEntry`, `Decision` enum, etc.), spec deviation is documented in §12.1 of the design doc
